phrases.intent_en: How long does the cellar tour take?
phrases.text_local: Combien de temps dure la visite des caves ?
phrases.pronunciation: kohm-BYAHN duh tahn DOOR lah vee-ZEET day KAHV
phrases.cultural_note: Champagne house cellar tours in Reims typically last between 45 minutes and an hour.

phrases.intent_en: Can I buy a bottle after the tour?
phrases.text_local: Est-ce qu'on peut acheter une bouteille après la visite ?
phrases.pronunciation: ess kohn PUH ash-TAY oon boo-TAY ah-PRAY lah vee-ZEET
phrases.cultural_note: All champagne houses have a shop at the end of the tour.

responses.english: Yes, at the shop on the way out.
responses.phonetic: wee ah lah boo-TEEK ahn sor-TAHN
responses.french: Oui, à la boutique en sortant.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how deep the Pommery cellars are
phrases.text_local: À quelle profondeur se trouvent les caves Pommery ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel proh-fon-DUR suh TROOV lay kahv poh-muh-REE
phrases.cultural_note: Pommery's cellars descend 30 metres underground through 18 kilometres of Gallo-Roman chalk tunnels, kept at a constant 10°C.

responses.english: Thirty metres underground, in the Roman chalk pits.
responses.phonetic: ah TRAHNT met-ruh soo TAIR, dahn lay kray-YAIR roh-MEN.
responses.french: À trente mètres sous terre, dans les crayères romaines.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the contemporary art installations are still on show
phrases.text_local: Les installations d'art contemporain sont-elles encore visibles ?
phrases.pronunciation: lay zans-tah-lah-SYON dar kon-tahn-poh-RAN son-TEL ahn-KOR vee-ZEEBL
phrases.cultural_note: Pommery regularly commissions site-specific art works installed in the chalk tunnels alongside the champagne racks.

responses.english: Yes, the exhibition changes every year.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to park near Pommery
phrases.text_local: Où peut-on se garer à proximité de Pommery ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo puh-TON suh gah-RAY ah prok-see-mee-TAY duh poh-muh-REE

responses.english: There is free parking in front of the estate.
responses.phonetic: eel ee ah uhn par-KEEN grah-TWEE duh-VAHN luh doh-MEN.
responses.french: Il y a un parking gratuit devant le domaine.

vocabulary.word_en: chalk (the rock of the Champagne caves)
